metaData.Ingredients: Dicalcium Phosphate Dihydrate, Water, Sorbitol, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Hydrated Silica, Arginine, Sodium Monofluorophosphate, Flavor, Cellulose Gum, Phosporic Acid, Tetrasodium Pyrophosphate, Sodium Saccharin, CI 77891
metaData.Key Information: New Colgate Maximum Cavity Protection Great Regular Flavour Toothpaste with Amino Power formula freshens breath and strengthens teeth from within. Containing arginine, naturally found in saliva and used to weaken the activity of bad bacteria; Calcium, that naturally replenishes an essential mineral found in teeth. Lastly, it contains flouride which helps prevent mineral loss and keeps teeth strong.

metaData.Key Information: New Sensodyne Repair & Protect Whitening with Novamin is different from other toothpastes. It has a unique, clinically proven concentrated calcium formula that helps repair vulnerable areas with the natural building blocks of your teeth, whilst helping to restore your teeth's natural whiteness.
metaData.Preparation:
• Brush twice a day and not more than three times, minimize swallowing and spit out
• Close cap after each use to protect contents from moisture

product.description:
• Helps to fight the root cause of 8 oral health problems - Gum Problems, Plaque, Tartar, Sensitivity, Enamel Erosion, Stains, Bad Breath, Cavities
• Its Powerful, Patented, Preventative Technology is clinically proven to provide 24 hours antibacterial action*
• Provides long lasting preventative benefits against bacteria to help prevent oral care problems before they start
• This formula contains a unique system that stabilizes our active ingredient and is designed for superior*** performance to help prevent many common oral care issues
• Use Colgate Total toothpaste twice daily to actively prevent against oral care problems before they start.
* 2x daily brushing with 4 weeks continued use
*** vs. non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste

metaData.Key Information:
The New Colgate Total Fresh Mint toothpaste, for Active Prevention, helps to fight the root cause of 8 oral health problems - Gum Problems, Plaque, Tartar, Sensitivity, Enamel Erosion, Stains, Bad Breath, Cavities. Its Powerful, Patented, Preventative Technology is clinically proven to provide 24 hours antibacterial action*, that provides long lasting preventative benefits against bacteria to help prevent oral care problems before they start. this formula contains a unique system that stabilizes our active ingredient and is designed for superior*** performance to help prevent many common oral care issues.

Use Colgate Total toothpaste twice daily to actively prevent against oral care problems before they start.

* 2x daily brushing with 4 weeks continued use
*** vs. non-antibacterial fluoride toothpaste

metaData.Key Information: Sensodyne Complete Protection Extra Fresh toothpaste builds a protective layer over the sensitive areas of your teeth for lasting sensitivity protection while giving you all the oral care benefits you need in one complete toothpaste. Sensodyne Complete Protection Extra Fresh toothpaste also strengthens and re-hardens your enamel, protecting it against plaque, maintaining healthy gums and helping you restore your teeth’s natural whiteness. Its extra fresh taste leaves a clean feeling in your mouth.
metaData.Preparation:
• Brush twice a day and not more than three times, minimize swallowing and spit out
• Replace lid to keep product dry

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Hydrated Silica, Sorbitol, Glycerin, Peg-12, Tetrapotassium Pyrophosphate, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Flavor, Zinc Citrate, Sodium Monofluorophosphate, Cellulose Gum, Benzyl Alcohol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Carbomer, Titanium Dioxide (Ci 77891), Sodium Saccharin, Sodium Hydroxide, Ci 74260,  Ci 47005, Ci 42051
metaData.Key Information:
DARLIE Double Action Fresh Protection Toothpaste is enriched with natural dual mint essences.
• Kills 99.9% Bacteria
• Has 12 Hr Bacterial Defense, clinically proven to provide Anti-bacterial protection for 12 hours
• Built in with Deep Oral Cleaning that helps to remove more extrinsic stains^ and forms a protective shield to reduce plaque build up
• Provides Long Lasting protection Against Bad Breath~
• Give you & your family a Fresher and Cleaner mouth

^compared with a blank control group using DARLIE Fluoride Toothpaste.
~Clinically proven to fight against bad breath for 12 hours.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Do not swallow
2. Rinse and spit out after use
